data.name: ENCOUNTER BARⅡ
data.detailed_description:
你以為我是一名，社會閒散人士？不，我擁有許多身份，那隻是其中一個而已，我最喜歡別人叫我“都市獵人”

每個女人都是神為我設下的獨特考驗，她們會有不同的身份，長相，身材，個性。今夜，又將是一個忙碌且……性福的夜晚。

獵艷····開始！ ···

你是這家酒吧的老主顧，所以你對這裡瞭如指掌，包括可以不動聲色的帶女孩去到隱秘的包間

你將大膽的認識這些女孩，並經過她們的“考驗”，用智慧與魅力解開她們心防，讓她們在你面前展露最真實的一面

遊戲中會穿插不同的遊戲，只有通過了，你才能進行你最喜歡的…事情

當然，遊戲內也不會無聊，還會有女孩陪你一件一件的脫掉他們的衣服

多個女性角色設定，不同性格，樣貌 ，服飾。會為你帶來不同的感官感受

你將使用你的一切手段，這其中可能還包括了你的大嫂。使這些女孩淪陷，在這裡，你更像一個惡魔，將魔爪伸向這些女孩，準備好接受這樣的體驗了嗎？

data.short_description: 《邂逅酒吧2》是一款劇情休閒遊戲。遊戲內擁有多線女性劇情，每個階段認識不同個性的女性，帶給你截然不同感官享受。
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 俄文*, 日文*, 簡體中文*, 繁體中文*, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙*, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

data.name: ENCOUNTER BARⅡ
data.detailed_description:
You think I'm some kind of social outcast? No, I have many identities; that's just one of them. I prefer to be called "Urban Hunter."

Every woman is a unique test set for me by God. They have different identities, looks, figures, and personalities. Tonight will be another busy and...sexually blissful night.

The hunt...begins!

You're a regular at this bar, so you know it like the back of your hand, including the ability to discreetly lead girls to secluded private rooms.

You'll boldly get to know these girls and pass their "tests," using your wit and charm to break down their defenses and reveal their truest selves.

The game includes various challenges; only by completing them can you do what you love most…

Of course, the game won't be boring either; there will be girls accompanying you as you undress them piece by piece.

Multiple female characters with different personalities, appearances, and outfits will provide you with diverse sensory experiences.

You'll use every means at your disposal, possibly including your sister-in-law, to make these girls succumb. Here, you're more like a devil, extending your clutches to these girls. Are you ready for this experience?

data.short_description: ENCOUNTER BARⅡ is a story-driven casual game. The game features multiple female-centric storylines, allowing you to meet women with different personalities at each stage, providing a completely different sensory experience.
data.supported_languages:

*languages with full audio support
